title: [cross-impl] Duplicate lichen_hash_32 impl in lichen_util.c and link_ctx.c
description: Commit 37563ab77 added lichen_hash_32 to l2/lichen_util.c matching test/vectors/hash_32.json and Rust/Python. Commit 63e9319f9 added identical copy in link/link_ctx.c (lines 615-623). This violates DRY, risks divergence (note C mul without explicit wrap like Python &0xffffffff or Rust wrapping_mul), and may cause link errors. Cross-impl consistency broken before full integration. See spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:76 and AGENTS.md test integrity.
